title: John Deere Enters Partnership with Advantage Capital to Increase Investment in Supporting Underrepresented Entrepreneurs and Business Owners
text: MOLINE, Ill. , Oct. 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) today announced it will be entering a partnership as a limited investor in Advantage Capital's Empower the Change (EPC) growth fund, which provides entrepreneurs of color access to capital in order to grow their businesses and create community wealth.

title: John Deere and Iowa State University Launch New Demonstration Farm to Help Farmers Feed and Fuel the World Sustainably
text: MOLINE, Ill. , Oct. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) announced a strategic partnership with Iowa State University (ISU) to establish a demonstration site consisting of four different fields and processes that will enable Deere to test sustainable solutions for large grain production systems in real-world scenarios.

title: John Deere Receives SBTi Validation of Greenhouse Gas Emission Reduction Targets
text: MOLINE, Ill. , Oct. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) announced that its emissions reduction targets have been validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi).
